key.name: playback-icons-layout
key.description: Controls how the playback icons are arranged in the panel indicator.

key.name: spacing
key.description: Sets the horizontal distance, in pixels, between the track title and the playback control icons.

key.name: set-title-width
key.description: Specifies the maximum width, in pixels, of the track title label before it is ellipsized.

key.name: indicator-flexibility
key.description: Controls how strictly the indicator width follows the configured title width. 0 = fixed maximal, 1 = adaptive, 2 = fixed minimal.

key.name: enable-seek
key.description: Allows seeking forward or backward in the current track using the mouse scroll wheel over the playback controls.

key.name: seek-offset
key.description: Sets the number of seconds to skip when seeking with the scroll action.

key.name: progress-indicator-width
key.description: Sets the width of the seek progress indicator in pixels.

key.name: show-progress-indicator
key.description: Shows the seek progress OSD indicator when scrolling to seek.

key.name: preferred-volume
key.description: Stores the preferred volume level as a percentage. Middle-clicking the track label applies this saved value.

key.name: preferred-volume-transition-duration-scale
key.description: Scales the stepped transition duration for preferred volume changes. Base steps are 500, 1000, and 1500 milliseconds.

key.name: preferred-volume-transition-rate
key.description: Controls logarithmic acceleration while transitioning to the preferred volume. Higher values accelerate more strongly near the end.
